instructionsToCompleteScan: Mount the Backup Plus volume on a machine where /Volumes/Backup Plus/... exists, OR copy NurseNest and 11 folders into this repo or an accessible path (e.g. /mnt/backup-nursenest).
Re-run the audit script locally with NODE_PATH or adjust ROOT in scripts/audit/scan-external-site.mjs.
Alternatively: zip the two folders and attach/extract under nursenest-core/data/external-mirror/ then request a re-scan.
